headline: The FAA Is Upgrading Air Traffic Control. RTX, Leidos and Other Companies Are Doing the Work.
summary: It’s far too early to guess at the root causes of the recent tragedy at LaGuardia airport.  Several public and private companies are involved in efforts to improve the system.  Sunday night, an  Air Canada  flight arriving from Montreal struck a Port Authority Aircraft Rescue and Firefighting vehicle.

headline: Northrop Stock Drops After President Trump Post. Why Defense Still Can’t Catch a Break.
summary: The U.S. and Iran have held talks. That revelation sent oil lower and most shares higher early on Monday.
